scripts.build: vite build && cp CNAME docs/CNAME && cp docs/index.html docs/404.html && mkdir -p docs/images docs/videos docs/404images && rsync -a --delete images/ docs/images/ && rsync -a --delete 404images/ docs/404images/ && rsync -a --delete --include='*/' --include='*.webm' --exclude='*' videos/ docs/videos/
